title: DoubleJumpZ
description: Add some fun little addition to your server
body:
# DoubleJumpZ

## Overview
DoubleJumpZ brings the exhilarating ability of double jumping to your Minecraft server. With a simple tap of the spacebar twice within a customizable timeframe, players can propel themselves upward and forward, reaching new heights and traversing terrain with style.

## Key Features

### Intuitive Mechanics
Players can activate a double jump by simply pressing the spacebar twice in quick succession while in mid-air. The plugin intelligently detects this action and applies a customizable boost, allowing for seamless integration with natural gameplay.

### Fully Customizable
Every aspect of the jumping experience can be tailored to your server's needs:
- **Jump Height and Force**: Fine-tune how high and far players can jump
- **Cooldown System**: Set the perfect balance between jumps to maintain game balance
- **Visual Effects**: Customize particles that appear during jumps
- **Sound Effects**: Choose from a variety of Minecraft sounds to accompany jumps
- **Custom Messages**: Personalize the notifications players receive

### Simple Toggle System
Players can easily enable or disable their double jump ability with a simple command:
- `/doublejumpz` - Toggle double jump on/off
- Aliases: `/djz` or `/djump` for convenience

### Permission-Based Control
Maintain full control over who can use double jumps:
- `doublejumpz.use` - Allows players to use the double jump feature
- `doublejumpz.admin` - Grants access to administrative commands

### Performance Optimized
The plugin is lightweight and optimized for performance, ensuring smooth gameplay even on busy servers.

## Why Choose This Plugin?

### Enhanced Gameplay Experience
This feature adds a new dimension to movement in Minecraft, allowing players to:
- Explore hard-to-reach areas
- Escape dangerous situations
- Create new parkour challenges
- Add excitement to PvP encounters

### Server Appeal
By offering this unique mobility option, your server stands out from others, providing players with a refreshing gameplay twist that keeps them engaged and coming back for more.

### Community Building
Double jumping creates opportunities for new mini-games, challenges, and shared experiences that bring your community together.

## Perfect For
- Survival servers looking to add movement options
- Parkour-focused communities
- PvP arenas where mobility adds strategy
- Hub servers seeking unique navigation mechanics
- Any server wanting to add a fun twist to player movement

This lightweight yet powerful plugin enhances your server's gameplay without complicated setup or performance impact. Give your players the freedom to soar with a simple double tap!
